purpose: Compact index of the MEA functional-reproduction evidence boundary; not a paper-results table.

source_evidence.snapshot_commit_resolution: Run git rev-parse HEAD after checkout; this file does not self-assert its containing commit.

paper_method_contract_audit.claim_boundary: Executable functional-contract audit; not a paper-scale validity or performance result.

tracked_compact_live_bundle.claim_boundary: A committed single-seed N=1-per-variant mechanism demonstration, not a stability or broad-generalization result.

taskgen_success_method.semantic_scope: official-equivalent actor, threshold, contact and boolean logic
taskgen_success_method.limitation: Not arbitrary model-authored Python or open-ended success semantics.

evaluation_graph.scope: one query, at most two checkpoint-bound ACT child nodes, one aspect and N=1 round per node
evaluation_graph.limitation: The CLI emits and adjudicates inert child commands but does not yet launch live children automatically.

server_only_evidence.availability_note: validation_runs and raw evaluation artifacts are not Git-tracked; re-run their validators on the canonical server before citing them as current after environment changes.

reproduction_status.functional: The single-task open-query loop is live on the current worktree: bounded planning, Task/Tool proposals, TaskGen, ACT, Rule Tool, Dynamic VQA, evidence-conditioned next-round choice and final feedback. A bounded cross-task EvaluationGraph exists at plan/outcome/replay level but does not yet auto-launch real children.
reproduction_status.experimental: Not reproduced at paper scale: ACT only, mostly N=1, proxy rather than independent human gold, limited task/aspect coverage, and no complete matched ablation, multi-policy or repeated benchmark tables.
highest_priority_gaps: execute one query-driven EvaluationGraph with verified real child outcomes and coverage-aware parent synthesis
route the bounded BBH scale capability from an open query through render and expert gates
demonstrate SuccessSpec diagnosis and bounded repair, not only compile-time rejection
materialize one performance and one safety concern from query to Tool/VQA evidence
run matched adaptive versus fixed ACT N=1, expanding to N=3 only if stable
replace assistant-proxy labels with independent human gold before paper-style Planner/VQA claims
